description: Cerebro evaluation gold standard. Labels relevant DOCUMENTS (not just QA pairs) per question, plus permission (ACL) and cross-lingual cases. Built early (plan §13 / critique P1) so retrieval/chunking/model changes are gated, not guessed. Cross-lingual cases require a real multilingual embedding model and are reported separately under the fake provider. Phase-2 exit gates: salary-allowed-acl exercises the principal-mapping expansion (entra-group:hr -> confluence-group:hr-payroll); salary-mapped-acl-deny pins that an UNMAPPED Entra group gets nothing; unresolved-principal pins that a chunk ACL with no mapping row (confluence-group:board-secret) is invisible to every caller.
